reply:
[[BLOCK:slide19_shape1]]
The primary distinction between Ordinary Least Squares Regression (OLS Regression) (普通最小二乘回归 (OLS Regression)) and Penalized Regression (惩罚回归 (Penalized Regression)) lies in the inclusion of a regularization term in the Loss Function (损失函数 (Loss function)) for Penalized Regression, which optimizes coefficient estimation. Consequently, Penalized Regression is also referred to as Regularized Regression (正则化回归 (Regularized Regression)).  
L1 Regularization (L1正则化 (L1 Regularization)) (LASSO): Uses the sum of the absolute values of coefficient estimates as the regularization term.  
L2 Regularization (L2正则化 (L2 Regularization)) (Ridge Regression (岭回归 (Ridge))): Uses the sum of the squared values of coefficient estimates as the regularization term.
